lesson: c2-l06 / Getting Started with Claude for Teachers
title: Getting Started with Claude

scenes.name: Title
scenes.text: Getting started with <emphasis>Claude</emphasis>. [pause] A second assistant — with a different feel for long-form teaching work.

scenes.name: Who builds it
scenes.text: Claude is built by <emphasis>Anthropic</emphasis>, founded by former OpenAI researchers. [pause] Same kind of language model — different design choices and behaviour.

scenes.name: Where it lives
scenes.text: Access it at <emphasis>claude.ai</emphasis>. [pause] Free tier for everyday work, paid Claude Pro for higher limits and the best models.

scenes.name: Strengths
scenes.text: Claude tends to write longer, more structured prose. [pause] It handles big documents in one go — chapters, curricula, long readings.

scenes.name: Features
scenes.text: Two features matter most for teachers. [pause] <emphasis>Projects</emphasis> keep your curriculum and style guide ready in every chat. <emphasis>Artefacts</emphasis> hold your drafts in a side panel you can edit.

scenes.name: Workflow
scenes.text: Four classroom-ready workflows. [pause] Process a long reading into student materials. Draft a unit plan. Build a rubric. Run a course inside a Project.

scenes.name: Privacy
scenes.text: Same rule as any AI tool. [pause] No real student names. No identifying details. No confidential documents. Anonymise first — always.

scenes.name: Two tools together
scenes.text: You do not need to pick just one. [pause] Many teachers use ChatGPT for quick drafts and Claude for sustained writing. [pause] Try both on the same task.
